c.d: The commission or listing fees associated with selling on the app.
The primary demographic or interest group the app caters to.
The range of product types that are commonly sold on the app.
Whether the app provides prepaid shipping labels or requires sellers to handle shipping independently.
How sellers receive payment for their sales (e.g., direct deposit, PayPal).
The approximate number of active users on the platform.
Ease of creating and managing product listings.
Policies and procedures in place to protect sellers from fraudulent buyers or transactions.
